g.text: Always-on, runs every 10 min during market hours

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the BSE universe sanitation step in detail')
g.text: ~5000 stocks: exclude ASM/GSM, suspended, corp actions today, price <50 or >5000

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are the exact liquidity filter thresholds?')
g.text: ADV > 10Cr, bid-ask spread <0.3%, min 500 ticks/hr, ATR% >1.5%

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is relative volume computed intraday?')
g.text: RVOL >2x baseline, price vs VWAP, opening range expansion, sector alignment

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is regime detection and how does it change weights?')
g.text: Classify day: trend / mean-revert / event / choppy. Weights shift per regime.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the champion score calculated?')
g.text: Top 1-3 stocks scored and stored. Redis TTL = 10 min.
Fires on "Start Trading". Parallel agents. 3-5 second total analysis time.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the technical analyst agent do?')
sendPrompt('What does the microstructure agent analyse?')
sendPrompt('What does the catalyst agent check?')
sendPrompt('How does the volatility agent set stops?')
sendPrompt('How does the meta-agent make the final trade decision?')
g.text: Confluence check: all agents must agree direction.
Confidence score, RR ratio, regime compatibility.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are all the risk gates that must pass?')
g.text: Min confidence 72%, min RR 1:2, spread <0.4%, no daily loss breach,
max 3 concurrent, no sector cluster, stale data check

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the execution plan include?')
g.text: Entry type, size, stop, target(s), time-stop, DhanHQ API order.
Monitor agent: adaptive exit on volatility/structure/time.
